subcodes.first_line: In this day the veil hath been lifted, and the exalted Truth, free from cover or concealment, proclaimeth its call and summoneth all to the Supreme Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم کشف غطا شده و حق منیع من غیر ستر و حجاب ندا میفرماید و کل را بافق اعلی میخواند
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @knowledge; recognition of God
